授業方法: Face to face formatStudents will practice all four skills (listening, speaking, reading, writing) over the course of the semester. Homework assignments and online on-demand assignments will often be used for discussions in later classes. Projects/presentations will require students to do some research and will focus on developing small and large group presentation skills.

第1回:
【Startup Week】"Online class（On-demand format）"／ 《270minutes》
URL:https://～・・・

Class 1: Introduction to Intensive English 19 (1)
Watch teacher videos and complete related tasks on course introduction, understanding the syllabus, expectations, and Google Classroom and folder set-up
URL:https://～・・・

Class 2: Introduction to Intensive English 19 (2)
Watch the video on the introductory writing task, with a narrated example, and submit the task on Google Classroom
URL:https://～・・・

Class 3: Introduction to Intensive English 19 (3)
Use your prior writing task in order to create a video introduction. An explanation video with an example is posted.
URL:https://～・・・
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第2回:
【Core Week ①】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Learner histories
Narrative writing drafting
IPA and basics of articulation

【Flex Hours】"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
IPA, English formatting in Word
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第3回:
【Core Week 2】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

AI in language learning
Narrative writing editing
Comparative articulation in English and Japanese consonants

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
AI effects on learning and education
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第4回:
【Core Week 3】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Causes and effects of overtourism (introduction to midterm topic)
Narrative writing feedback and final draft
Comparative articulation of English and Japanese vowels

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
Topical video/lecture on overtourism issues in Japan
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第5回:
【Core Week 4】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Opinion paragraph task, drafting, and research (midterm topic)
Small group sharing on locations in Japan that could use more tourism, opinion paragraph introduction
AI for editing to learn, working on final drafts (and individual practice)

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
Topical video/lecture on example locations in Japan that could benefit from more tourism
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第6回:
【Core Week 5】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Feedback on paragraph writing, groups for presentations
Presentation skills and making good slides, group presentation rubric introduced
Group time to work on presentation files

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
Overview of effective presentation skills, example presentation and how it would be graded by our rubric
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第7回:
【Core Week 6】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Final editing and slides feedback
Midterm Presentations day 1
Middterm Presentations day 2

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
How to interpret your grade on the speaking rubric and use it to improve skills
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第8回:
【Core Week 7】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Introduction to essay writing (argumentative essay)
Topical discussion (to consider essay topics, various)
Basic practice in prosody, marking prior writing for speech

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
Prosody and spoken grammars
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第9回:
【Core Week 8】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Essay introduction
Essay body paragraphs
Prosody and key in speech (through discussion topics)

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
Key in prosody, examples from highlighted famous speeches and explanations
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第10回:
【Core Week 9】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Essay conclusion
Formatting our essays, rough drafts due
Prosody with connected speech and liaison rule, practice

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
English essay formatting in Word, navigating the program (screencast video)
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第11回:
【Core Week 10】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Introduction to final presentation topics (multiple available)
Discussion across a variety of potential topics (related to final presentations)
Essay rough draft feedback

【Flex Hours】

"Online class（On-demand format）" ／ 《50minutes》
Using video to practice and improve your presentation skills)
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第12回:
【Core Week 11】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Essay editing and questions
Drafting guides and scripts for final presentations
Essay final editing and final drafts due
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第13回:
【Flex Hours】"Online class（On-demand format）"／ 《40minutes》
Video lecture on preparing for next semester, final reflection, considerations over the break.
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.
第14回:
【Core Week ⑫】"Face-to-face class"／ 《270minutes》

Final preparations and editing for presentations
Final presentations day 1
Final presentations day 2
Students should expect 60-90 minutes of homework per each class session.

Life 4 (Student's Book with the Spark Platform), 2nd ed.
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1
※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）

Teacher will provide further questions as well as both written and verbal feedback for writing assignments and presentations in order to prompt further learning. Clear rubrics will be provided and marked for papers, and presentations.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: • Participation (40%) • Narrative paragraph (10%) • Opinion Paragraph (10%) • Midterm Presentation (10%) • Persuasive Essay (20%), In-Class Final Presentation (10%)
成績評価Grading2: 備考　Note Intensive English: Students who are absent 6 times or are late 10 times automatically fail. 30 minutes late or more constitutes an absence.
